task_name: Add Custom Theme System to T3 Code Editor

plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's the complete plan for the custom theme system. It touches **6 files** with no new dependencies and no build config changes:

---

### What changes

**`packages/shared/src/themes.ts`** (new file)
Pure TS module with `Theme` + `ThemeColors` interfaces, 3 built-in themes (`t3-dark`, `t3-light`, `t3-midnight`), and `getTheme(id)` / `listThemes()` functions. No `effect` or `contracts` dependencies needed.

**`packages/shared/package.json`** (add one entry)
Adds `"./themes": { "types": "./src/themes.ts", "import": "./src/themes.ts" }` — same pattern as `./model`, `./git`, etc.

**`apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts`** (full rewrite)
Replaces the light/dark/system toggle with full theme objects. Keeps the exact same `useSyncExternalStore` module-level pattern. `applyTheme()` now sets `--background`, `--foreground`, `--primary`, `--ring`, `--t3-sidebar`, `--t3-editor`, `--t3-terminal`, `--t3-status-bar` as inline CSS vars on `<html>`, and toggles `.dark` class based on `theme.isDark` (so existing Tailwind `dark:` classes keep working). New API: `{ theme: Theme, setTheme(id), availableThemes }`.

**`apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx`** (new file)
Radio-group of theme cards matching the existing settings page style. Each card shows 5 colour swatches (bg, fg, accent, sidebar, editor) + theme name + "Selected" badge.

**`apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx`** (targeted edit)
Swaps the Appearance section internals (System/Light/Dark radio buttons + "Active theme" line) for `<ThemeSelector />`. Removes the now-dead `useTheme` import and `THEME_OPTIONS` constant.

**`apps/web/src/index.css`** (two small inserts)
Adds CSS fallback defaults for the 4 new `--t3-*` variables in both `:root` and `@variant dark` — safe values before JS executes.
